fonts:
'Segoe UI Emoji',
    'Apple Color Emoji',
    'Noto Color Emoji',
    system-ui,
    -apple-system,
    'Segoe UI',
    Roboto,
    Arial,
    sans-serif
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial,
      sans-serif !important

-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial,
    sans-serif

-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', helvetica, arial,
    sans-serif

-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', helvetica, arial,
    sans-serif !important

ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New',
    monospace

var(
    --app-theme-font-sans,
    var(
      --app-font-family-sans,
      -apple-system,
      BlinkMacSystemFont,
      'Segoe UI',
      roboto,
      'Helvetica Neue',
      helvetica,
      arial,
      sans-serif
    )
  )

var(
    --pd-toolbar-control-font-family,
    -apple-system,
    BlinkMacSystemFont,
    'Segoe UI',
    roboto,
    'Helvetica Neue',
    helvetica,
    arial,
    sans-serif
  )
colors: Hsl(r: number, g: number, b: number)
Rgb(h: number, s: number, l: number)
Rgb(h: number, s: number, v: number)
strokes:
0,
  $preview-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 94%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 6%),
  $preview-shadow: none,
  $preview-rotate: 3deg,
  $placeholder-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 94%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 6%),
  $move-duration: 0.12s,
  $move-ease: ease
)

0,
  $tab-min-height: null,
  $tab-padding: 12px 16px,
  $tab-radius: 10px,
  $tab-border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 30%, transparent),
  $tab-background: rgb(var(--bg1)),
  $tab-color: rgb(var(--fg)),
  $tab-font-size: 0.9rem,
  $tab-font-weight: 600,
  $tab-hover-transform: translateX(4px) scale(1.02),
  $tab-hover-background: linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      rgb(var(--primary) / 0.14) 0%,
      rgb(var(--primary) / 0.08) 100%
    ),
  $tab-hover-shadow: (
    -3px 0 0 0 rgb(var(--primary)) inset,
    0 0 0 1px rgb(var(--primary) / 0.2) inset,
    0 3px 10px rgb(var(--primary) / 0.15),
    0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08)
  ),
  $tab-active-transform: translateX(4px),
  $tab-active-background: transparent,
  $tab-active-border-color: transparent,
  $tab-active-shadow: none,
  $tab-active-color: rgb(var(--fg)),
  $icon-size: 18px,
  $icon-width: 26px,
  $icon-hover-transform: scale(1.12) rotate(-3deg),
  $icon-hover-color: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $icon-hover-filter: brightness(1.2) drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgb(var(--primary) / 0.5)),
  $icon-active-color: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $icon-active-filter: brightness(1.2) drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgb(var(--primary) / 0.4)),
  $label-hover-transform: translateX(3px),
  $label-hover-color: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $label-hover-weight: 600,
  $label-active-transform: translateX(2px),
  $label-active-color: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $label-active-weight: 650,
  $badge-min-width: 18px,
  $badge-height: 18px,
  $badge-padding: 0 5px,
  $badge-background: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $badge-color: #fff,
  $badge-font-size: 0.7rem,
  $badge-font-weight: 700,
  $badge-hover-transform: scale(1.1)
)

1px dashed
      var(--supplier-editor-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 56%, transparent))

1px solid
      color-mix(in oklab, var(--supplier-editor-border, rgb(var(--border-strong))) 88%, transparent)

1px solid
      var(--supplier-editor-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 56%, transparent))

1px solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, rgb(168 85 247)) 30%, rgb(var(--border)) 70%)

1px solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, rgb(168 85 247)) 64%, rgb(var(--border)) 36%)

1px solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, rgb(var(--primary))) 30%, rgb(var(--border)) 70%)

1px solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, rgb(var(--primary))) 32%, rgb(var(--border)) 68%)

1px solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, rgb(var(--primary))) 64%, rgb(var(--border)) 36%)

1px solid
    var(--tsl-panel-control-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 54%, transparent))

1px solid
    var(--tsl-panel-divider, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 42%, transparent))

1px solid
          var(--ss-hybrid-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 40%, transparent))

1px solid
          var(--ss-hybrid-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 55%, transparent))

1px solid
          var(--ss-hybrid-divider, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 55%, transparent))

1px solid color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border) / 0.5) 80%, transparent),
  $preview-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 94%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 6%),
  $preview-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.28),
  $preview-grid-template: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto,
  $preview-gap: 8px,
  $preview-rotate: 4deg,
  $placeholder-border-color: rgb(var(--primary) / 0.38),
  $placeholder-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 92%, rgb(var(--primary)) 8%),
  $move-duration: 0.12s,
  $move-ease: ease
)

1px solid color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 30%, transparent),
  $button-background: rgb(var(--bg1)),
  $button-color: rgb(var(--fg)),
  $button-font-size: 12px,
  $button-font-weight: 600,
  $button-letter-spacing: 0,
  $button-transition: (
    transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1),
    background-color 0.2s ease,
    border-color 0.2s ease,
    color 0.2s ease,
    box-shadow 0.25s ease
  ),
  $hover-border: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--primary)) 28%, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 72%),
  $hover-background: rgb(var(--bg1)),
  $hover-color: rgb(var(--primary)),
  $hover-shadow: none,
  $hover-transform: translateX(3px),
  $focus-outline: none,
  $focus-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(var(--primary) / 0.18),
  $active-transform: translateX(2px) scale(0.99),
  $active-shadow: none,
  $disabled-opacity: 0.56
)

1px solid color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--primary)) 36%, rgb(var(--border)) 64%),
  $preview-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 90%, white 10%),
  $preview-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.35),
  $preview-rotate: 0deg,
  $placeholder-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 92%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 8%),
  $move-duration: 0.17s,
  $move-ease: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)
)
1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--event-color, var(--cal-primary)) 42%, transparent)
1px solid var(--ss-hybrid-border, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 65%, transparent))

1px solid var(--tsl-drag-border),
  $preview-background: var(--tsl-drag-bg),
  $preview-shadow: none,
  $preview-grid-template: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto,
  $preview-gap: 9px,
  $preview-rotate: 5deg,
  $placeholder-border-color: transparent,
  $placeholder-background: transparent,
  $move-duration: 0.14s,
  $move-ease: ease
)

2px solid
          var(--ss-hybrid-muted, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--fg)) 45%, transparent))

color-mix(
    in oklab,
    rgb(var(--border-strong, var(--border))) 26%,
    transparent
  )

color-mix(
    in oklab,
    rgb(var(--border-strong, var(--border))) 34%,
    transparent
  )

color-mix(
    in oklab,
    rgb(var(--border-strong, var(--border))) 40%,
    transparent
  )

color-mix(
    in oklab,
    rgb(var(--border-strong, var(--border))) 48%,
    transparent
  )

color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 68%, transparent),
  $background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 96%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 4%),
  $checked-background: color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--primary)) 72%, rgb(var(--surface)) 28%)
)

transparent transparent
    color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border-strong)) 70%, rgb(var(--border)) 30%) transparent

transparent transparent
    color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--surface)) 92%, rgb(var(--bg1)) 8%) transparent

var(--proj-outline-w) solid
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--proj-outline-color) 60%, transparent)

var(--proj-outline-w, 1px) solid
    color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--outline-soft)) 68%, transparent)

var(--proj-outline-w, 1px) solid
    var(--proj-grid-line, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 44%, transparent))

var(--proj-outline-w, 1px) solid
    var(--proj-outline-color, color-mix(in oklab, rgb(var(--border)) 52%, transparent))
iconPackages: Material prices could not be refreshed.
materializes unknown large group rows synchronously so row checkboxes update immediately

rules: Reuse extracted tokens before adding a new color, font, radius, stroke, or icon family.
If a needed role is absent, add a semantic token to the existing design-system source before consuming it.
Prefer the existing icon family and stroke style; introduce another library only with an explicit ownership and bundle-cost decision.
Use extracted font assets and declared font stacks before recommending a new font.
Do not recommend visual values from category convention alone; require project evidence or a documented exception.
